meaning: v.召集,召唤,号召,鼓起,振作
examples: She was trying to summon up the courage to leave him.
I punched the button to summon the elevator.
It took her a full month to summon the courage to tell her mother.
She drew the attention of neighbors who helped her break through a door and summon police.
Technology, too, may have had a role, for BlackBerrys were widely used to summon mobs.
